reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_266]]
Speaker 2: I’d also like to add one more thing. We all know that many of our students here today would not have made it this far without the support of their families. So I want to extend my heartfelt congratulations to all the family members who devoted their time and effort to make this important moment possible.

[[BLOCK:srt_267]]
Speaker 3: All right, I think that brings our interview to a close.

[[BLOCK:srt_268]]
Speaker 3: You probably need to head off to your next meeting.

[[BLOCK:srt_269]]
Speaker 2: Yes, of course.

[[BLOCK:srt_270]]
Speaker 2: Once we add this segment to what I said earlier, the video should come out to about ten minutes. Yes, that should do it.
